name: Light Points Calculator
seo_title: How Many Light Points Do I Need?
seo_description: Use our free light points per room calculator to quickly estimate puntos_luz, enchufes based on area_m2, uso. No registration needed.
example_label: Calculate recommended light points for a bedroom of 18m2.
result_context: Habitación of {area_m2}m² to {uso} requires {puntos_luz_ud} points of luz: {techo_ud} in techo, {pared_ud} in pared. power total: {potencia_w}W. Interruptores: {interruptores_ud} conmutados.
formula_display: Puntos_techo = area ÷ 6m²; Puntos_pared = according to uso; total = sum
steps: Total: 3 techo + 2 pared = 5 points of luz
Prever conmutación in input and cabecera of cama
mistakes: No prever conmutación (incómodo apagar luz from The cama)
No Consider luz of lectura junto a The cama
Ubicar interruptor detrás of The puerta (debe quedar accesible)
description: Lighting design based on room area and recommended lux levels.
